title: smp
text: smp Include the entire Unicode range (SMP) USYS$PGS_PARAMS = smp : on | off Description By default, the connector allows storage only of UCS-2 (or BMP) Unicode characters for the W packing code. Specify the connector option smp:on to enable storage of the entire Unicode range (or SMP) in W packing code fields. If not specified, this option defaults to disabled ( off ).
